build.buildCommand: mkdir -p data && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq tippecanoe python3-pip && export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install 20 && npm install -g pmtiles && npm install && curl -sL -o data/indicadores.gpkg "${GPKG_URL:-https://github.com/bitsandbricks/NIDO_app/releases/download/v1/indicadores.gpkg}" && python3 -m pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python3 scripts/prepare_data.py && npm run build
